Lines.Speaker: You
Lines.Text: Is something the matter over there?

Lines.Speaker: Lily
Lines.Text: I can't reach that file... it's stuck way up there.

Choices.Text: If I were as short as you, I'd be miserable.

Lines.Speaker: You
Lines.Text: (grabs the file and hands it over) Here you go.

Lines.Speaker: Lily
Lines.Text: My whole day just got brighter. Thank you <3
